commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl delete pod nixl-probe -n yanxi-validation --ignore-not-found --wait=true 2>&1; echo  | base64 -d > ~/workspace/yanxi/stage4/nixl-probe.yaml && kubectl apply -f ~/workspace/yanxi/stage4/nixl-probe.yaml 2>&1'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl -n yanxi-validation logs nixl-probe 2>&1 | grep -E "agent created|error|Error|Traceback|plugin|OK" | head -30'
